Image index: 9

HSV Channel Expressions:
H(x,y) = pow(sqrt((0.7773076)), (0.2239461) - tan(exp(tan(y)))) / pow(sin(sqrt((-0.91624963)) * sqrt(y)), sin((-0.6990587)) - (-0.5922041))
S(x,y) = y
V(x,y) = x / tan(exp(y - cos(cos((-0.9692742)))))
